title: Active Directory Administrator with L2 Production support
description:
Job Summary
We are hiring a Active Directory Administrator with minimum 5 to 20 years of experience in Active Directory / Entra ID within banking and be able to join a global team for over-the-clock activities.

Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Administration, operation, and hardening of Corporate / Resources / Isolation AD forests.
  • Management of Domain Controllers (Windows Server 2019/2022), GPO, DNS, Sites & Services, replication.
  • Management of Entra ID, IAM, and AD Connect.
  • Participation in Group projects: AD consolidation, DNS redesign, tiering, and securing sensitive accounts.
  • Automation using PowerShell, industrialization of operations (audits, provisioning, remediation).
  • Contribution to the AD Disaster Recovery Plan (detection, restoration, technical communication).
  • Monitoring & auditing: Change Auditor, EDR, log collection.
  • Participation in transversal projects: M&A, application integration, onboarding/offboarding, security compliance.
  • Documentation (DAT/DEX), contribution to AD governance.
  • Ensure that the practices comply with local and international regulations and industry standards.
  • Prepare and maintain documentation for internal or external audits
  • Contribute to the Permanent Control framework for implementation of policies and procedures in day-to-day business activities, such as Control Plans
  • Contribute to the improvement of prevention and detection capabilities for mitigation of IT & Security risks.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in IT/Computer Science or related discipline.
  • Should have minimum 5 to 20 years of experience in Active Directory Administration / Entra ID within banking industry. Overall experience not more than 20 years.
  • Must have experience in L2/L3 Active Directory production support.
  • Should have experience in Active Directory Domain Services, DNS, GPO, PKI, ADFS.
  • Should have experience in Entra ID / Azure AD Connect / Identity Governance.
  • Must have experience in advanced PowerShell (audits, automated scripts, remediation).
  • Experience in Security concepts is required using similar tools like RBAC, Zero Trust, MFA, AD Tiering.
  • Experience in Tools like Sempris ADFR/Forest Druid, Ranger AD, PingCastle, Microsoft 365, Defender, GraphAPI.
  • Knowledge of AD DRP/BCP is good to have.
  • Embraces agile ways of working, with peers across the globe.
  • Strong security awareness, rigor, and mastery of critical environments.

Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send it to divyapuvvada@morganmckinley.com. Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Dinu Dinesh

EAP Registration No: R22110286

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
